# Stocky AI — Web App

> Chat-based AI trading assistant for Indian stock markets. Ask anything about stocks, markets, and trading.

Stocky AI is a conversational AI assistant for Indian retail investors. It provides real-time stock analysis, market news, portfolio tracking, and trade execution through Zerodha.

## Capabilities

- **Stock Analysis**: Fundamental (P/E, ROE, D/E, earnings), technical (RSI, MACD, SMA), news sentiment scoring
- **Market Overview**: Live indices (NIFTY, SENSEX, Bank Nifty), top gainers/losers, advances/declines
- **News Aggregation**: 25+ RSS feeds (Indian, global, commodities, energy, Asia) with AI summaries
- **Deep Research**: Dual-agent system — Quick Agent (Groq) + Deep Agent (Gemini) + Synthesis
- **Market Scanning**: Volume pumps, breakouts, 52W high/low, sector movers, FII/DII flows
- **Charting**: TradingView embeds and custom dark-theme analysis charts
- **Stock Comparison**: Side-by-side fundamental and technical comparison
- **Sector Rotation (RRG)**: Relative strength analysis across 8 NSE sectors
- **IPO Tracker**: Upcoming and recently listed IPOs with performance
- **Macro Dashboard**: Forex (USD/INR), commodities (gold, crude), global indices, RBI repo rate
- **Trade Execution**: Buy/sell via Zerodha Kite with 2-phase confirmation
- **Portfolio**: Holdings, positions, margins, day P&L via Kite API

## Data Sources

25+ RSS feeds, yfinance, nsetools, NSE India API, Zerodha Kite Connect, Finnhub, Twelve Data, Gold API, USGS, NASA EONET

## Links

- Web App: https://llm.stockyai.xyz
- Landing Page: https://stockyai.xyz
- Terminal: https://terminal.stockyai.xyz
